workflows.name: Product Delivery Lifecycle
workflows.description: End-to-end flow from idea to user feedback. Suited for small teams (<15 people) focused on building and shipping.

workflows.name: Company Reorganisation (30 Staff)
workflows.description: Structural redesign for a 30-person company. Applies when the team has grown beyond the founding structure and roles, reporting lines, and accountability need to be redefined.

steps.name: Assessment
steps.description: Audit current teams, identify bottlenecks, skill gaps, and reporting issues across all 30 staff

steps.name: Structure Design
steps.description: Design the new org chart — define teams, reporting lines, and role responsibilities at scale

steps.name: Communication
steps.description: Announce the reorg to all staff — explain the why, the timeline, and what changes for each team

steps.name: Role Transition
steps.description: Move people into new roles, rebalance teams, and manage departures if needed

steps.name: Process Alignment
steps.description: Update workflows, tooling, and rituals to match the new structure — standups, reviews, OKRs

steps.name: Revenue Continuity
steps.description: Ensure sales pipeline and customer relationships are unaffected during the transition

steps.name: Stabilisation
steps.description: Measure team velocity, morale, and delivery quality under the new structure — course correct as needed
